announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Remsons Industries Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 23, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Remsons Industries Limited has submitted a revised outcome of its Board Meeting held on March 23, 2026, to correct a typographical error. The error was identified in the disclosure made under Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, specifically within the section detailing the buyers and their affiliation to the promoter or group companies. The company has provided a corrected version of this disclosure, ensuring accuracy in reporting the buyers' details. No other information in the original submission has been altered.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Gem Aromatics Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Disclosure received under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Gem Aromatics Limited has received a disclosure from a Designated Person in compliance with Regulation 29(2) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The company has enclosed this disclosure as Annexure-A for the record of the stock exchanges, BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Limited. This filing is a regulatory requirement to inform the market about substantial shareholding changes. Investors should review Annexure-A for specific details regarding the acquisition.

announcements.subject: Agreements
announcements.detail: COMPLIANCE OF REGULATION 30 OF SEBI (LODR) REGULATIONS, 2015- INTIMATION ABOUT EXECUTION OF MEMORANDUM OF UNDERSTANDING (MOU) WITH GOVERNMENT OF BIHAR
announcements.ai_summary: Mahanagar Telephone Nigam Limited (MTNL) has entered into a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with the Government of Bihar on March 24, 2026. Under this agreement, MTNL will transfer the leasehold rights of seven residential properties located in the Asian Games Village Complex, New Delhi, to the Government of Bihar. The agreed valuation for these properties is Rs 68.43 Crore. This transfer is contingent upon MTNL receiving the necessary Non-Objection Certificate (NOC) from the Delhi Development Authority (DDA) and executing the Lease Transfer Deed. Further approvals from the DDA and other relevant authorities are also required to finalize the transaction.

announcements.subject: Capacity addition
announcements.detail: Escorts Kubota Limited has informed the Exchange about Updates on Capacity addition
announcements.ai_summary: Escorts Kubota Limited has been allotted approximately 154 acres (6,23,291 sq mt) of land by the Yamuna Expressway Industrial Development Authority (YEIDA) in Sector-10, Gautam Buddha Nagar, Uttar Pradesh. This allotment, confirmed by a letter dated March 24, 2026, is for setting up a Greenfield Project to enhance production capacities. This follows an earlier intimation on February 10, 2026, and signifies a substantial expansion in the company's manufacturing footprint. The event occurred at 12:00 Noon on March 24, 2026.

announcements.subject: Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.detail: Deep Industries Limited has informed the Exchange about Amalgamation/Merger
announcements.ai_summary: Deep Industries Limited (DIL) has announced that the Scheme of Amalgamation of its wholly-owned subsidiary, Kandla Energy and Chemicals Limited (KECL), with and into DIL has been sanctioned by the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Ahmedabad Bench. The NCLT order, dated March 23, 2026, was uploaded on the NCLT portal on March 24, 2026. The merger was processed under Sections 230 to 232 of the Companies Act, 2013. Investors should note the completion of this amalgamation, which was previously disclosed on June 30, 2025.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Hindustan Oil Exploration Company Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 24, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Hindustan Oil Exploration Company Limited (HOEC) announced the outcome of its Board Meeting held on March 24, 2026. The board accepted the resignation of Mr. N Sivalai Senthilnathan as Chief Financial Officer, effective March 28, 2026. Subsequently, based on recommendations from the Nomination and Remuneration Committee and the Audit Committee, the board appointed Mr. Allen Joseph Andrade as the new Chief Financial Officer, effective April 01, 2026. This leadership change in a key financial role is a significant development for the company.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Letter to Shareholders - Notice of Meeting of the Equity Shareholders
announcements.ai_summary: Veranda Learning Solutions Limited has issued letters to shareholders whose email addresses are not registered, providing a weblink to access the Notice of Meeting of Equity Shareholders. This meeting is convened as per the directions of the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Chennai Bench. The notice can be accessed on the company's website, www.verandalearning.com. This communication, dated March 24, 2026, is a procedural step following the NCLT's directive and is crucial for shareholders to stay informed about the company's affairs.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Arkade Developers Limited has informed the Exchange about being awardedwith two ISO Certifications.
announcements.ai_summary: Arkade Developers Limited has been awarded two ISO Certifications: ISO 9001:2015 for Quality Management Systems and ISO 45001:2018 for Occupational Health and Safety Management Systems. The certifications were received on March 23, 2026, from SGS United Kingdom Ltd. This achievement, announced on March 24, 2026, demonstrates the company's commitment to maintaining high standards in quality and workplace safety. Investors can view this as a positive indicator of the company's operational integrity.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Jindal Stainless Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 24, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Jindal Stainless Limited has announced the commissioning of its Indonesian stainless steel melt shop (SMS) facility, adding 1.2 million tonnes per annum (MTPA) of capacity. This development, detailed in a press release dated March 24, 2026, also includes a commitment of an additional INR 900 crore investment to expand downstream capacities in India. The company targets a sales volume of 3.5 MTPA by FY29, aiming for a double-digit CAGR. This expansion, partly through a joint venture, signifies a strategic move to bolster its global and domestic market presence.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: The Jammu & Kashmir Bank Limited has informed the Exchange about GST Demand
announcements.ai_summary: The Jammu & Kashmir Bank Limited has received a GST demand notice dated March 23, 2026, from the Additional Commissioner, Central GST Commissionerate, Jammu. The demand is for a GST liability of Rs. 200,20,80,009.00, along with applicable interest and a penalty of Rs. 200,20,80,009.00. The bank has provided detailed information as required under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. This significant financial demand will be a point of focus for investors regarding the bank's financial health and potential liabilities.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Sterling Tools Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Details of Key Managerial Personnel to determine materiality of an event or information and for making disclosures to stock exchanges under SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015'.'.
announcements.ai_summary: Sterling Tools Limited has updated the stock exchanges on the appointment of its Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, Mr. Atul Agg, as per Regulation 30(5) of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. This disclosure, dated March 24, 2026, provides the contact details for Mr. Agg, who is authorized to determine the materiality of events for disclosure purposes. This action is in line with the company's policy on materiality determination and ensures compliance with SEBI regulations. Investors should note that this is a procedural update regarding key personnel responsible for regulatory disclosures.

announcements.subject: Capacity addition
announcements.detail: Maruti Suzuki India Limited has informed the Exchange about Capacity addition
announcements.ai_summary: Maruti Suzuki India Limited's Board has approved the first phase of capacity addition at its Khoraj Industrial Estate site, aiming to add 2,50,000 vehicles per annum by 2029. This expansion is in addition to its existing capacity of 24 Lac units per annum across Gurugram, Manesar, Kharkhoda, and Hansalpur, which is currently fully utilized. The company is acquiring land for this expansion from Gujarat Industrial Development Corporation. The investment required for this first phase is INR 10,000 Crores. The company will provide further updates as market conditions evolve and the project progresses.

announcements.subject: Diversification/Disinvestment
announcements.detail: Asahi India Glass Limited has informed the Exchange about Disinvestment
announcements.ai_summary: Asahi India Glass Limited's subsidiary, AIS Consumer Glass Solutions Limited ("CG"), has approved the sale of its entire 34% stake in Under Par Sports Technologies Private Limited ("Target Company"). The Target Company is an associate of CG and an indirect associate of Asahi India Glass Limited. This divestment, approved on March 24, 2026, will result in the Target Company ceasing to be an associate of CG and an indirect associate of Asahi India Glass Limited. The transaction details are in accordance with SEBI Master Circular No. HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD- POD2/1/3762/2026 dated January 30, 2026.

announcements.subject: Capacity addition
announcements.detail: Godawari Power And Ispat limited has informed the Exchange about Approval for Setting up of   1.00 MTPA Integrated Steel Plant.
announcements.ai_summary: Godawari Power and Ispat Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 24, 2026, approved the establishment of a new Integrated Steel Plant with a capacity of 1.00 Million tons per annum. This plant will produce heavy and medium section structural steel and wire rods, aiming to strengthen the company's presence in the steel sector and capitalize on growing demand. The plant will be located at village Sarora, Tehsil Tilda, District Raipur, Chhattisgarh, approximately 50 KMs from Raipur. The estimated cost for this project is Rs.7000 Crores, to be funded equally through debt and equity (internal accruals) in a 1:1 ratio. The meeting commenced at 12:30 PM and concluded at 1:50 PM.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Tega Industries Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Tega Industries Limited has disclosed inter-se transfer of 72,78,925 equity shares carrying voting rights. This transfer occurred on March 24, 2026, via an off-market gift from Mr. Manish Mohanka, a Promoter, to MM Business Trust, a member of the Promoter Group. This transaction is in accordance with Regulation 29(1) and 29(2) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, and is covered by an exemption order from SEBI dated January 27, 2026. Importantly, the aggregate holding of the Promoter and Promoter Group remains unchanged, with no impact on the control and management of Tega Industries Limited.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Future Consumer Limited has informed the Exchange about Update on NCLT hearing   SBI Vs Future Consumer Limited
announcements.ai_summary: Future Consumer Limited provided an update on the NCLT hearing concerning the case filed by State Bank of India ('SBI'). In a hearing on March 24, 2026, SBI, the financial creditor, withdrew part of its claim and revised its interest component due to an error in computation. The Hon’ble Tribunal granted SBI two weeks to file an amended form-1 by way of an affidavit, with one week thereafter for Future Consumer Limited to file its reply. The matter has been adjourned to April 23, 2026. This update follows the company's earlier disclosure on February 16, 2026, regarding the NCLT filing.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Emcure Pharmaceuticals Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Emcure Pharmaceuticals Limited has announced the re-appointment of two Independent Directors, Mr. Vijay Keshav Gokhale and Dr. Vidya Rajiv Yeravdekar, effective April 16, 2026. Mr. Gokhale will serve a second term of 5 consecutive years, while Dr. Yeravdekar will serve a second term of 3 consecutive years. These re-appointments were approved by the company's members through a postal ballot process, including remote e-voting. This announcement follows a previous intimation dated February 04, 2026, and is in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI Listing Regulations.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Godawari Power And Ispat limited has informed the Exchange about regarding Disposal of Stake in Ardent Steel Private Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Godawari Power and Ispat Limited (GPIL) has completed the second tranche of its stake disposal in Ardent Steel Private Limited (ASPL), transferring 2,00,000 equity shares for Rs 6.60 Crores on March 24, 2026. This transfer represents 2.52% of ASPL's equity. Following this transaction, GPIL's stake in ASPL has been diluted from 20.98% to 18.46%, resulting in ASPL ceasing to be an associate company of GPIL effective March 24, 2026. This action is in continuation of the company's earlier announcements on February 06, 2026, and March 06, 2026, regarding the disposal of its entire 37.85% stake for a total consideration of Rs 90.87 Crores, subject to statutory and contractual requirements.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Godawari Power And Ispat limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 24, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Godawari Power and Ispat Limited, in a meeting held on March 24, 2026, approved the establishment of a new Integrated Steel Plant with an annual capacity of 1.00 Million tons per annum. This plant will produce heavy and medium section structural steel and wire rods, strengthening the company's position in the steel sector. The project, to be located at village Sarora, Tehsil Tilda, District Raipur, Chhattisgarh, is estimated to cost Rs 7000 Crores and will be funded equally through debt and equity (internal accruals) in a 1:1 ratio. The meeting commenced at 12:30 PM and concluded at 1:50 PM.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: K.P. Energy Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Press Release titled   KP Group surpasses 1 GW energised IPP capacity milestone'.
announcements.ai_summary: K.P. Energy Limited has issued a press release announcing that the KP Group has surpassed a significant milestone of 1 GW in energised Independent Power Producer (IPP) capacity. This achievement is part of the Group's total IPP portfolio of 2.3 GW and signifies strong progress in its long-term growth strategy focused on IPP development. Since FY21, the Group has experienced approximately 18x growth in energised capacity, from 58 MW to over 1 GW. This scale-up reflects a strategic focus on building a high-quality, owned IPP portfolio with strong execution discipline, with particularly strong momentum observed in FY26.

announcements.subject: Press Release

announcements.ai_summary: Summary: Meesho Limited has issued a press release on March 24, 2026, announcing the launch of "Vaani - Your Meesho Dost," India's first Gen-AI powered conversational voice shopping assistant. This disclosure is made under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The press release details the new AI-powered feature designed to enhance the shopping experience for users. The information will also be available on the company's website, www.meesho.com.

announcements.ai_summary: Electronics Mart India Limited has commenced commercial operations for a new Multi-Brand Store under the brand name ‘ELECTRONICS MART’. The store is located at Shop No. 1 & 2, S-2, S-2/4, Ground Floor, Commercial Shopping Centre-1, Avantika, Sector-1, Rohini, Delhi-110085, spanning 3,200 square feet. Commercial operations began on March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: Disclosure under SEBI Takeover Regulations
announcements.detail: Bhavesh Pravin Sheth has Submitted to the Exchange a copy of Disclosure under Regulation 10 (5) of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.ai_summary: Bhavesh Pravin Sheth has submitted a disclosure to the Exchange under Regulation 10 (5) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

announcements.subject: Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: PC Jeweller Limited has informed regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: PC Jeweller Limited's Board of Directors has allotted 35,18,36,870 equity shares on the conversion of Fully Convertible Warrants. This allotment follows the earlier issuance of 48,08,02,500 warrants by way of preferential allotment. The resolution for the allotment was passed by circulation on March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Sudarshan Colorants India Limited has informed the Exchange about receipt of GST Order
announcements.ai_summary: Sudarshan Colorants India Limited has received a GST Order from the Office of the Commercial Tax Officer in Chidambaram-I, Cuddalore, Tamil Nadu, dated March 23, 2026. The company is in the process of filing an appeal against this order. The company states that there is no impact on its financial, operational, or other activities due to this order.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: In continuation of its earlier intimation dated March 18, 2026, Vedant Fashions Limited has informed the Exchange about the rescheduling of meeting with investor(s) / analyst(s), as detailed in the enclosed letter.
announcements.ai_summary: Vedant Fashions Limited has rescheduled one of its investor/analyst meetings. The meeting originally scheduled for March 23, 2026, will now take place virtually on March 24, 2026. The company will only discuss publicly available information during these interactions.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Birla Corporation Limited has informed the Exchange regarding copy of press release issued by the Company w.r.t. the commencement of third line of production at Kundanganj unit in Uttar Pradesh of RCCPL Private Limited, a wholly owned material subsidiary of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Birla Corporation Limited announced that its wholly-owned subsidiary, RCCPL Private Limited, has commissioned a third production line at its Kundanganj grinding unit in Uttar Pradesh. This expansion increases the unit's production capacity by 1.4 million tons. A press release detailing this development has been issued.

announcements.subject: Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: GB Global Limited has informed regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: GB Global Limited has lent Rs. 13,00,00,000 (Rupees Thirteen Crore) to Tangent Profin Private Limited. The company has confirmed that the promoter/promoter group has no interest in this investment. The transaction was conducted on an arm's length basis.

announcements.subject: Board meeting Cancelled
announcements.detail: Intimation of Cancellation of Board Meeting to be held on Monday, March 23, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Euro Multivision Limited has cancelled its Board Meeting that was scheduled for March 23, 2026. This meeting was intended to consider and approve financial results for various periods. The company will inform the stock exchanges of a revised meeting date in due course.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Orient Green Power Company Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Orient Green Power Company Limited has been allotted 61,44,490 equity shares at a face value of Rs. 10 each by its subsidiary, Delta Renewable Energy Private Limited (DELTA). This allotment represents a portion of DELTA's third tranche of a preferential issue. Orient Green Power Company Limited's equity holding in DELTA remains unchanged at 70% subsequent to this allotment.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: GOCL Corporation Limited has informed the Exchange about Update on monetization of land at Yelahanka, Bengaluru (Ecopolis)
announcements.ai_summary: GOCL Corporation Limited's Board of Directors has approved the early monetization of its land at Yelahanka, Bengaluru, known as the 'ecopolis' project. This project involves approximately 38 acres of land under a joint development agreement with Hinduja Realty Ventures Limited. The proposed monetization will be a sale of the entire land and buildings to a top industrial house for a total consideration of approximately Rs. 2,261 crores, to be completed in tranches.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Endurance Technologies Limited has informed the Exchange regarding one-on-one meeting  scheduled on 25th March, 2026 from 3.00 p.m. to 4.00 p.m. in Pune.
announcements.ai_summary: Endurance Technologies Limited has scheduled a one-on-one meeting with Axis Mutual Fund on March 25, 2026, from 3:00 p.m. to 4:00 p.m. in Pune. Senior management representatives will attend the meeting.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Capri Global Capital Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "Capri Global secures Moody s  Ba3  Ratings and Fitch  BB- ; Signals Strong Credit Strength and Growth Momentum".
announcements.ai_summary: Capri Global Capital Limited announced on March 23, 2026, that it has secured a 'Ba3' Corporate Family Rating from Moody's and a 'BB-' Long-Term Issuer Default Rating from Fitch Ratings. These ratings signal strong credit strength and growth momentum for the NBFC.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: In compliance of Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR ESG score of 60 has been assigned by M/s ESG Risk Assessments & Insights Limited is submitted. The other details given in the attached letter.
announcements.ai_summary: NHPC Limited has received an ESG score of "60" from M/s ESG Risk Assessments & Insights Limited. This score is now available on the websites of BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Limited. The company has complied with Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR for this disclosure.

announcements.subject: Options to purchase securities
announcements.detail: Akzo Nobel India Limited has informed the Exchange about Options to purchase securities by approving JSW Dulux Limited - Employee Stock Option Scheme, 2026, subject to shareholder approval
announcements.ai_summary: JSW Dulux Limited (formerly Akzo Nobel India Limited) has approved the Employee Stock Option Scheme, 2026. This approval is subject to shareholder consent. The company also appointed two new directors to its Board.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: AWL Agri Business Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: AWL Agri Business Limited (formerly Adani Wilmar Limited) announced that the Ministry of Corporate Affairs approved the strike-off of its subsidiary, AWL Edible Oils and Foods Private Limited. This approval was granted on March 23, 2026, following an application filed by the subsidiary on January 27, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Samvardhana Motherson International Limited has submitted with the Stock Exchange an update on acquisition.
announcements.ai_summary: Samvardhana Motherson International Limited (SAMIL) provided an update on its proposed acquisition of a 28.15% stake in HR Dhauliganga Private Limited (HRDPL). HRDPL is a special purpose vehicle established by Hinduja Renewables Energy Private Limited. This acquisition is related to captive power generation and consumption under Electricity Laws.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: We herewith enclosed the Outcome of the Board Meeting held today i.e March 23, 2026, approving the Proposed acquistion of Avenir International Engineers and Consultants LLC, Abu Dhabi. Detailed letter is enclosed.
announcements.ai_summary: SEPC Limited's Board of Directors approved the acquisition of Avenir International Engineers and Consultants LLC, Abu Dhabi. This decision was made during a board meeting held on March 23, 2026. The acquisition is subject to approvals from the company's lenders and shareholders.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Akzo Nobel India Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 23, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: JSW Dulux Limited (formerly Akzo Nobel India Limited) announced board meeting outcomes on March 23, 2026. The board appointed Mr. Kaustubh Sudhakar Kulkarni as an Additional Director (Non-Executive Non-Independent) and Ms. Sutapa Banerjee as an Additional Director (Independent Woman Director). Both appointments are effective March 23, 2026, and are subject to shareholder approval.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Indo-National Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Revised Unaudited Consolidated Financial Results for the Quarter and HalfYear Ended September 30, 2025'.
announcements.ai_summary: Indo-National Limited has submitted revised Unaudited Consolidated Financial Results for the quarter and half-year ended September 30, 2025. An omission occurred during the preparation of the previous statements, specifically the failure to eliminate investments in M/s. Helios Strategic Systems Limited amounting to ₹64.50 Crores. This has been rectified, resulting in a reduction in Non-Current Financial Assets and Total Assets.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Ashoka Buildcon Limited has informed the Exchange about Redemption of Commercial Papers issued by the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Ashoka Buildcon Limited has successfully redeemed its Commercial Papers amounting to ₹50 Crore on the due date, March 23, 2026. The redemption payment, including interest, has been made in full. This disclosure is in accordance with SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Options to purchase securities
announcements.detail: STL Networks Limited has informed the Exchange about Options to purchase securities
announcements.ai_summary: STL Networks Limited has allotted 45,198 equity shares of face value ₹2 each under its Employee Stock Option Scheme - 2025 (SNL ESOS 2025). This allotment was approved by the Authorization and Allotment Committee on March 23, 2026, upon the exercise of options granted under the scheme. The details of this allotment are available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Astral Limited has informed the Exchange about Grant of patent  MULTIPORT WATER OUTLET  to Al-Aziz Plastics Private Limited a wholly Owned Subsidiary of the Company
announcements.ai_summary: Astral Limited's wholly-owned subsidiary, Al-Aziz Plastics Private Limited, has been granted a patent by the Government of India for its "MULTIPORT WATER OUTLET" invention. This patent, valid for 20 years from November 01, 2021, relates to a solution for multiple household connections from a single tapping with flexible outlet configurations. The invention aims for cost-efficiency, reduced disruption, and longer main-pipe life.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Indogulf Cropsciences Limited has informed the Exchange about appointment of M/s Adfactors PR Private Limited as the Investor Relations agency with effect from April 01, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Indogulf Cropsciences Limited has appointed M/s Adfactors PR Private Limited as its Investor Relations agency. This appointment will be effective from April 01, 2026. Investors are advised to direct all future correspondence to this agency or contact the company directly.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Solar Industries India Limited has informed the Exchange about Certificate confirming fulfilment of payment obligation with respect to Commercial Paper issued dated December 23, 2025 by Solar Industries India Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Solar Industries India Limited has confirmed the full payment of Rs. 100 Crores for its Commercial Paper issued on December 23, 2025. The payment was made on the due date, March 23, 2026, to Kotak Mahindra Bank Limited. This fulfills the company's payment obligation related to this issuance.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Update under Regulation 30 read with Para A Part A of Schedule III of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Medplus Health Services Limited's subsidiary, Optival Health Solutions Private Limited, has received a suspension order for a Drug License for a store located in Karnataka. This update is provided in accordance with SEBI circulars regarding disclosure requirements. Further details will be available on the company's website and the stock exchanges.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Godawari Power And Ispat limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Updates on the Scheme of Amalgamation of Godawari Energy Limited with Godawari Power And Ispat Limited and their eespective Shareholders.'.
announcements.ai_summary: Godawari Power And Ispat Limited has received a certified copy of the National Company Law Tribunal's (NCLT) order dated March 12, 2026, sanctioning the amalgamation of its wholly-owned subsidiary, Godawari Energy Limited, with itself. The order has been filed with the Registrar of Companies, making the scheme effective as of March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Dcx Systems Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: DCX Systems Limited has received purchase orders from its domestic and international customers amounting to INR 14.00 Crores. These orders are for the manufacture and supply of Cable and Wire Harness Assemblies. The company has informed the stock exchange about these new orders received in the normal course of business.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Nestle India Limited has informed the Exchange about Update on a one-on-one meet (virtual) with an institutional investor held on 23rd March 2026
announcements.ai_summary: Nestle India Limited held a one-on-one virtual meeting with an institutional investor on March 23, 2026. The company has confirmed that no unpublished price sensitive information was shared during this meeting. This update is in reference to their previous letter dated March 9, 2026, and is also available on the company's website.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Navin Fluorine International Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Navin Fluorine International Limited announced the release of the remaining 150,000 equity shares, previously pledged to State Bank of India (SBI), by its promoter Mafatlal Impex Private Limited. This release is effective upon SBI's confirmation of the release of all pledged shares.

announcements.subject: Action(s) initiated or orders passed
announcements.detail: The Company hereby intimates regarding receipt of penalty order dated 18th March 2026 from the Office of the Assistant Commissioner of State Tax Unit-103, Gandhidham
announcements.ai_summary: Shree Renuka Sugars Limited has received a penalty order dated March 18, 2026, from the Office of the Assistant Commissioner of State Tax Unit-103, Gandhidham. This order was issued under Section 74 of the CGST Act, 2017.

announcements.subject: Agreements
announcements.detail: GNG Electronics Limited has informed the Exchange about Execution of Supplemental and Amendatory Agreement with ICICI Bank Limited
announcements.ai_summary: GNG Electronics Limited has entered into a Supplemental and Amendatory Agreement with ICICI Bank Limited on March 10, 2026, to an existing Facility Agreement. The company received this agreement on March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Zenith Exports Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 23, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Zenith Exports Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 23, 2026, approved the appointment of Mrs. Rasna Goyal as an Additional Director in the category of Non-Executive, Independent Director. She will hold this position for five consecutive years from March 23, 2026, subject to shareholder approval.

announcements.subject: Awarding of order(s)/contract(s)
announcements.detail: G R Infraprojects Limited has informed the Exchange about Awarding of order(s)/contract(s)
announcements.ai_summary: G R Infraprojects Limited has been awarded a Letter of Award (LOA) dated March 23, 2026, from the National Highways Authority of India for the "Construction of 4 lane Greenfield Section of NH-33 from Mokama to Munger in the State of Bihar." The contract price for this project is INR 2440.87 Crores, and it is to be completed within 910 days on a Hybrid Annuity Mode.

announcements.company: Canara HSBC Life Insurance Company Limited
announcements.subject: Amendment to AOA/MOA
announcements.detail: Canara HSBC Life Insurance Company Limited has informed the Exchange regarding the Amendment to AOA/MOA of the company.
announcements.ai_summary: Canara HSBC Life Insurance Company Limited has approved amendments to its Articles of Association (AOA) through a special resolution passed via postal ballot. This disclosure is made pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company's registered office is in New Delhi, and its corporate office is in Gurugram, Haryana.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: NBCC (India) Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Intimation of Work Orders received by NBCC (India) Limited in the ordinary course of business amounting to Rs 58.61 Cr. approx.'.
announcements.ai_summary: NBCC (India) Limited has secured a new work order from Maharaja Sriram Chandra Bhanja Deo University in Mayurbhanj, Odisha. The approximate value of this order is Rs 58.61 crore, excluding GST. This award falls within the ordinary course of the company's business operations.

announcements.subject: Issue of Securities
announcements.detail: Bajaj Finance Limited has informed the Exchange about issue of Securities
announcements.ai_summary: Bajaj Finance Limited's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 23, 2026, approved the issue of 3,472,439 equity shares. These shares will be issued at their respective grant prices to the Trustees of BFL Employee Welfare Trust under the BFL Employee Stock Option Scheme, 2009. The Board meeting commenced at 2:15 p.m. and concluded at 4:10 p.m.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: DMCC SPECIALITY CHEMICALS LIMITED has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: DMCC Speciality Chemicals Limited has been served with a commercial suit filed by Shipping Corporation of India Limited (SCI) in the Hon’ble City Civil Court. The company has provided details as required by SEBI Listing Regulations, stating that these litigations are not expected to materially impact its financial position.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: TREJHARA SOLUTIONS LIMITED has informed the Exchange regarding 'Update on Acquisitions '.
announcements.ai_summary: Trejhara Solutions Limited has completed the acquisition of 100% equity stake in LP Logistics, a Dubai-based entity. LP Logistics will now become a wholly owned subsidiary of Trejhara Solutions Limited. Additionally, the company has set up a joint venture with G S Marketing Associates and concluded the acquisition of its business undertaking.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Star Cement Limited has informed the Exchange about  intimation of Environment, Social and Governance ( ESG ) Rating by CFC Finlease Private Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Star Cement Limited has received an unsolicited ESG rating of 70 from CFC Finlease Private Limited, a SEBI registered rating provider. This rating is based on publicly disclosed information for the financial year ended 2025 and reflects the company's performance on Environmental, Social, and Governance parameters.

announcements.subject: Change in Auditors
announcements.detail: DIC India Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Change in Auditors of the company.
announcements.ai_summary: DIC India Limited has informed the exchanges about the proceedings of its 78th Annual General Meeting (AGM) held on March 23, 2026. The AGM was conducted via two-way Video Conferencing/Other Audio Visual Means in accordance with Ministry of Corporate Affairs and SEBI circulars.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Setco Automotive Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 23, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Setco Automotive Limited's Board of Directors has approved a draft Scheme of Amalgamation to merge its wholly-owned subsidiary, Lava Cast Private Limited (LCPL), with the company. This merger is subject to approvals from the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), shareholders, creditors, and other regulatory authorities.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: PVR INOX Limited has informed the Exchange about opening of 3-screen Multiplex at DLF Midtown Plaza, Moti Nagar, New Delhi.
announcements.ai_summary: PVR INOX Limited has opened a new 3-screen multiplex at DLF Midtown Plaza in Moti Nagar, New Delhi. This expansion brings PVR INOX's total screen count to 1,802 across 360 properties in 114 cities in India and Sri Lanka. The new cinema features advanced projection and sound systems.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Intimation of receipt of ISO 9001:2015 Certification for the Secretarial Function'.
announcements.ai_summary: Crompton Greaves Consumer Electricals Limited's Secretarial Function has received ISO 9001:2015 certification from Bureau Veritas. This certification recognizes the company's robust quality management systems, standardized processes, and commitment to corporate governance and operational excellence.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Wipro Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "Wipro Expands Strategic Presence in South Korea, Launches Innovation Lab in Seoul".
announcements.ai_summary: Wipro Limited announced the expansion of its business operations in South Korea, including an enlarged office footprint in Seoul and the launch of a new Innovation Lab. This move reinforces South Korea's role as a strategic growth market for Wipro and enhances its ability to serve local clients.

announcements.company: Gujarat Kidney And Super Speciality Limited
announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Gujarat Kidney And Super Speciality Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Gujarat Kidney And Super Speciality Limited has executed the acquisition of Parekhs Hospital Private Limited as its wholly-owned subsidiary on March 22, 2026. Further details as required by SEBI regulations have been provided in an annexure.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Hindustan Foods Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "HFL announces acquisition of Beauty Care and Cosmetic products manufacturing business .
announcements.ai_summary: Hindustan Foods Limited (HFL) has announced the acquisition of a Beauty Care and Cosmetic products manufacturing business through a Business Transfer Agreement. This acquisition is being made by HFL, which is a Vanity Case Group Company. Further details of the acquisition are provided in a press release dated March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Fineotex Chemical Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates on the Plant Visit scheduled to be held on Tuesday, March 24, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Fineotex Chemical Limited will host an investor and analyst plant visit on Tuesday, March 24, 2026, at its Ambernath plant in Maharashtra. The visit will include representatives from various firms such as Mili Capital, Prad Capital, and Fort Capital. No price-sensitive information will be discussed during the visit.

announcements.subject: Giving guarantees/indemnity/ becoming a surety for third party
announcements.detail: Puravankara Limited has informed the Exchange about Corporate Guarantee given on behalf of Pune Projects LLP in favour of RBL Bank Limited.
announcements.ai_summary: Puravankara Limited has provided a Corporate Guarantee of Rs. 50,00,00,000 (Fifty Crores Rupees) on behalf of Pune Projects LLP in favour of RBL Bank Limited. This disclosure is made in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: Kamdhenu Limited has informed regarding Disclosure of Acqusition
announcements.ai_summary: Kamdhenu Limited's Loan and Investment Committee has approved the conversion of an existing unsecured loan of Rs. 10,00,00,000 (Ten Crores Rupees) to M/s Maa Kudargarhi Steels Private Limited (MKSPL) into 20,000 equity shares. The conversion is on a private placement basis, with an issue price of Rs. 4990 per share, based on a valuation report.

announcements.subject: Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: Mahindra Lifespace Developers Limited has informed regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: Mahindra Lifespace Developers Limited shareholders have approved the transfer of a business undertaking to its subsidiary, Mahindra Blossom Developers Limited, on a slump sale basis. The resolutions were passed by the requisite majority via postal ballot, with the voting results declared on March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Bhageria Industries Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: The trading window for Bhageria Industries Limited will be closed from April 01, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of audited financial results for the quarter and year ending March 31, 2026. The date of the board meeting to consider these results will be announced later. This closure applies to connected and designated persons and their immediate relatives.

announcements.company: Swan Defence and Heavy Industries Limited
announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Swan Defence and Heavy Industries Limited has informed the Exchange that the Company has achieved the requisite Minimum Public Shareholding through the recently concluded Offer for Sale on 19/03/2026 of 26,38,747 equity shares by the Promoters of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Swan Defence and Heavy Industries Limited has achieved the required Minimum Public Shareholding (MPS). This was accomplished through an Offer for Sale on March 19, 2026, where promoters sold 26,38,747 equity shares. The company's revised shareholding now stands at 89.90% for promoters and 10.10% for the public.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Smartworks Coworking Spaces Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: SNS Infrarealty LLP, a promoter of Smartworks Coworking Spaces Limited, has acquired equity shares from the open market. This acquisition represents less than 2% of the company's total shareholding. Consequently, it does not trigger mandatory disclosure requirements under SEBI regulations.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Hind Rectifiers Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "HIRECT Announces Availability of Advanced Copper Conductors forHigh-Power Transformers from Expanded India Facility".
announcements.ai_summary: Hind Rectifiers Limited (HIRECT) has announced the commercial availability of advanced copper products, including Continuously Transposed Conductors (CTC), Paper Insulated Copper Conductors (PICC), and Enameled Paper Insulated Copper Conductors (EPICC). These products are manufactured at their newly inaugurated state-of-the-art copper processing plant in Nashik, India, and will be exported globally for high-power transformers and wound components.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: LTM Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "LTM Expands BlueVerseTM Tech with AppIQ, AgentIQ and FusionIQ to Accelerate AI-Led Engineering".
announcements.ai_summary: LTIMindtree Limited announced the expansion of its AI-led engineering platform, BlueVerseTM Tech. This expansion includes the launch of three new purpose-built platforms: AppIQ, AgentIQ, and FusionIQ. These platforms are designed to help enterprises modernize applications, manage AI-first software delivery, and engineer quality at scale. The announcement was made on March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: Updates
announcements.detail: Oil India Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Board Comments on fine levied by the Exchange '.
announcements.ai_summary: Oil India Limited's Board of Directors met on March 20, 2026, to discuss a fine levied by the stock exchanges for non-compliance with SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015, regarding board composition for the quarter ended December 31, 2025. The Board advised requesting a waiver of the fines, citing that the non-compliance was beyond the company's control.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Sterling Tools Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 23, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Sterling Tools Limited's Board of Directors met on March 23, 2026, from 10:30 AM to 01:15 PM. During the meeting, Ms. Pragya Saxena was appointed as the Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, designated as Key Managerial Personnel (KMP), effective March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Bosch Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "Press Release in connection with Joint venture project ".
announcements.ai_summary: Bosch Limited and Tata AutoComp Systems Limited have announced a joint venture to accelerate future growth in e-mobility. This announcement follows their earlier joint venture agreement dated March 18, 2026. The press release regarding this joint venture was issued on March 23, 2026.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Limited has informed the Exchange about General Updates
announcements.ai_summary: Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Limited has completed the acquisition of an additional 30.58% equity stake in its subsidiary, Apollo Health and Lifestyle Limited (AHLL). The transaction involved acquiring 41,650,638 equity shares from International Finance Corporation and IFC EAF Apollo Investment Company for Rs. 12,540.68 million. Following this acquisition, Apollo Hospitals' effective shareholding in AHLL has increased to 99.42%.

announcements.subject: Outcome of Board Meeting
announcements.detail: Rhetan TMT Limited has informed the Exchange regarding Outcome of Separate Meeting of the Independent Directors of the Company held on March 23, 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: Rhetan TMT Limited has informed the Exchange about the outcome of a Separate Meeting of its Independent Directors held on March 23, 2026. The Independent Directors reviewed and considered the performance of Non-Independent Directors and the Board of Directors, as well as the performance of the chairperson. They also assessed the quality, quantity, and timeliness of information flow between the management and the Board.

announcements.subject: General Updates
announcements.detail: Jeena Sikho Lifecare Limited Has Informed the Exchange About Publication of Case Study and Case Reports.
announcements.ai_summary: Jeena Sikho Lifecare Limited has announced the publication of academic case studies and case reports in the "International Journal of Advanced Research (IJAR)". These publications, authored by medical professionals associated with the company, including its Managing Director and senior consultants, highlight the company's commitment to Ayurvedic research and evidence-based clinical practice.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Bharti Airtel Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "Airtel brings faster speeds and wider 5G coverage to millions in Gujarat with 2,750+ new sites".
announcements.ai_summary: Bharti Airtel Limited has issued a press release announcing the deployment of over 2,750 new 5G sites across Gujarat in the last 12 months. This expansion aims to provide faster speeds, wider coverage, and an improved network experience for millions of customers in 36 districts.

announcements.subject: Press Release
announcements.detail: Hindustan Zinc Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated March 23, 2026, titled "Hindustan Zinc and Tata Steel Partner to Scale Low-Carbon ZincSolutions with EcoZen".
announcements.ai_summary: Hindustan Zinc Limited and Tata Steel are partnering to scale low-carbon zinc solutions with a product called EcoZen. This collaboration aims to reduce value-chain emissions, as EcoZen offers over 75% lower carbon intensity than conventional zinc. announcements.subject: WeWork India Management Ltd - 544570 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Media Release-Embassy Vertex
announcements.ai_summary: WeWork India Management Limited has announced a significant expansion in Bengaluru by signing a 10-year lease for an additional ~81,000 square feet of workspace at Embassy Vertex. This expansion represents an investment of ₹31 crore by WeWork India. The company, a leading premium flexible workspace operator, aims to enhance its presence in the Bengaluru market. This move is detailed in a media release dated March 25, 2026, and is also available on the company's investor relations website. The expansion is expected to cater to the growing demand for flexible office solutions in the city.

announcements.subject: Infosys Ltd - 500209 - Infosys Finacle To Power Digital Transformation For Producers Savings Bank Corporation In The Philippines
announcements.detail: Enclosed
announcements.ai_summary: Infosys Finacle, a subsidiary of Infosys, will power the digital transformation for Producers Savings Bank Corporation in the Philippines. This involves upgrading to the latest Finacle Core Banking Solution and implementing the Finacle Origination Solution. The upgrade aims to strengthen the bank's digital foundation, enhance operational resilience, and unlock new capabilities for personalized financial services. The Finacle Origination Solution will enable the bank to scale its lending business for SMEs and retail customers. This announcement was made on March 25, 2026.

announcements.subject: Baroda Extrusion Ltd - 513502 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Independent Director Meeting As On 25Th March, 2026
announcements.detail: outcome of independent director meeting as on 25th March, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: The Independent Directors of Baroda Extrusion Limited convened a meeting on March 25, 2026, commencing at 10:00 am. During this meeting, they reviewed the performance of the Non-Independent Directors and the Board as a whole. Additionally, the performance of the Chairman was assessed, considering feedback from Executive and Non-executive Directors. The directors also evaluated the quality, quantity, and timeliness of information flow between the company management and the Board to ensure effective performance of their duties. This outcome has been communicated to BSE Limited for their records. Vaishali Joshi is the Company Secretary.

announcements.subject: IndiGrid Infrastructure Trust - 540565 - Reg 23(5)(i): Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: Indigrid Infrastructure Trust has informed the Exchange regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: IndiGrid Infrastructure Trust, through IndiGrid Investment Managers Limited, has completed the acquisition of securities in Gujarat BESS Private Limited for an enterprise value of approximately INR 573 Crore, subject to closing adjustments. The sellers are Securityholders British International Investment PLC (“BII”) and Norfund via KNI India AS (“Norfund”). This acquisition pertains to a project operating under a Build Own Operate (“BOO”) model, which is expected to generate an annual revenue exceeding INR 97 Crore. The disclosure was made on March 25, 2026, in accordance with Regulation 23 of the SEBI (Infrastructure Investment Trusts) Regulations, 2014. The next steps involve finalizing closing adjustments as per the definitive agreements.

announcements.subject: MAS Financial Services Ltd - 540749 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Allotment of non-convertible debentures
announcements.ai_summary: MAS Financial Services Ltd has completed the allotment of 10,000 Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) with a face value of INR 1,00,000 each, aggregating to INR 100,00,00,000 (INR 100 Crore). These are rated, listed, senior, secured, redeemable, transferable, and taxable NCDs issued on a private placement basis. This decision was made by the Finance Committee of the Board of Directors on March 25, 2026, following a Board meeting on April 30, 2025. The company has complied with SEBI LODR Regulations and a master circular dated January 30, 2026. This issuance is a private placement, and no further approvals are immediately indicated as pending.

announcements.subject: Take Solutions Ltd - 532890 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release
announcements.detail: Press Release - TAKE Solutions Launches Take.Health - An Intelligent Health Companion Targeting India''s $197 Billion Healthcare Opportunity.
announcements.ai_summary: Take Solutions Ltd has launched "Take.Health," an AI-driven digital health platform focused on preventive healthcare and personalized insights. This initiative targets India's substantial $197 billion healthcare market, aligning with the company's strategy to develop scalable capabilities in digital health and AI solutions. The launch, announced on March 25, 2026, aims to provide continuous health monitoring for users. The company has submitted this information to the BSE and NSE as per Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The next steps involve the market adoption and growth of the Take.Health platform.

announcements.subject: SGL Resources Ltd - 526544 - Intimation Of Payment Of Fine As Levied Under Regulation 33 For The Period Ended December 31, 2025
announcements.detail: Intimation of payment of fine as lecied under Regulation 33 for non compliance with filling unaudited financial statements for the quarter ended December 31, 2025 within presecribed period under said regulation
announcements.ai_summary: SGL Resources Ltd has paid a fine of Rs. 88,500/- to BSE Limited on March 24, 2026. This fine was levied under Regulation 33 for non-compliance with filing unaudited financial statements for the quarter ended December 31, 2025, within the prescribed period. The company received an email on March 17, 2026, detailing the penalty. The fine includes GST. This action is in response to a SEBI SOP Circular no. SEBI/HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD-POD2/I/3762/2026 dated January 30, 2026.

announcements.subject: Fino Payments Bank Ltd - 543386 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 SEBI LODR
announcements.detail: Receipt of Order from Hon''ble High Court of Telangana
announcements.ai_summary: Fino Payments Bank Ltd has received an order from the Hon'ble High Court of Telangana on March 24, 2026, dismissing a Writ Petition filed by Mr. Rishi Gupta, MD & CEO, challenging his arrest. This order follows earlier disclosures made by the bank on February 27, 2026. The bank acknowledges the court's decision and is considering appropriate legal recourse. The ongoing investigation pertains to program managers associated with multiple banks, including Fino Payments Bank. The bank will provide further updates as legal proceedings progress.

announcements.subject: R R Kabel Ltd - 543981 - Announcement Under Regulation 30
announcements.detail: Please find enclosed herewith intimation relating to Orders received from the Income Tax Department.
announcements.ai_summary: R R Kabel Ltd has received Re-assessment Orders from the Office of the Deputy Commissioner of Income Tax for Assessment Years 2018-19, 2019-20, and 2021-22. The company has provided the required details in "Form A" and Annexure-2 as per Regulation 30(13) of SEBI Listing Regulations and relevant SEBI Master Circulars. This announcement, made on March 24, 2026, follows previous intimations regarding tax assessments. Investors should carefully review the details of these orders, which are enclosed with the announcement, to understand any potential financial implications for the company. The company has also provided details as per SEBI Master Circular HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD- POD2/I/3762/2026 dated January 30, 2026.

announcements.subject: Manappuram Finance Ltd - 531213 - Board Meeting Intimation for Fund Raising/Other Business Matters
announcements.detail: Manappuram Finance Ltdhas informed BSE that the meeting of the Board of Directors of the Company is scheduled on 30/03/2026 ,inter alia, to consider and approve the borrowing program including issuance of redeemable non-convertible debentures, notes, bonds and other debt securities in the onshore and/or offshore markets by way of private placement and/or public issue and other permissible modes of borrowing for the Financial Year 2026-27.
announcements.ai_summary: Manappuram Finance Ltd's Board of Directors will meet on March 30, 2026, to consider and approve the company's borrowing program for the Financial Year 2026-27. This program includes the issuance of redeemable non-convertible debentures, notes, bonds, and other debt securities. These securities may be issued through private placement, public issue, or other permissible modes in both onshore and offshore markets. The company is seeking to raise funds to support its operations and growth for the upcoming financial year.

announcements.subject: HDFC Bank Ltd - 500180 - Board Meeting Intimation for Approval Of The Audited Standalone Financial Results Of HDFC Bank Limited For The Quarter/Year Ended March 31, 2026, Audited Consolidated Financial Results For The Quarter/ Year Ending March 31, 2026 And Other Important Matters
announcements.detail: HDFC Bank Ltdhas informed BSE that the meeting of the Board of Directors of the Company is scheduled on 18/04/2026 ,inter alia, to consider and approve audited standalone financial results of HDFC Bank Limitedfor the quarter/year ended March 31, 2026, audited consolidated financial results for the quarter/ year ending March 31, 2026 and other important matters
announcements.ai_summary: HDFC Bank Ltd will convene a Board Meeting on April 18, 2026, to approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider the recommendation of dividend, if any, for the financial year 2025-26 and fix the record date for the same. The trading window for the bank's securities will be closed from March 25, 2026, until the financial results are announced. This meeting is crucial for investors to assess the bank's financial performance.

announcements.subject: Sammaan Capital Ltd - 535789 - Intimation Under Regulations 30 And 51 Of The SEBI (Listing Obligations And Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, As Amended
announcements.detail:
This is further to our earlier intimations, with respect to the proposed acquisition of controlling stake in Sammaan Capital Limited by Avenir Investment RSC Ltd (Investor), which us owned and controlled by International Holding Company PJSC (Proposed Transaction).
We wish to inform that the Reserve Bank of India has vide its letter dated March 24, 2026, approved the applications made by the Company and Sammaan Finserve Limited (SFL)respectively, ....
announcements.ai_summary: Sammaan Capital Ltd has received approval from the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) on March 24, 2026, for the proposed acquisition of a controlling stake by Avenir Investment RSC Ltd. Avenir Investment RSC Ltd is owned and controlled by International Holding Company PJSC. This approval follows previous intimations made by the company on October 2, 2025, October 29, 2025, November 7, 2025, and December 10, 2025. The RBI's clearance is a significant step towards the completion of this proposed transaction.

announcements.subject: Nexome Capital Markets Ltd - 508905 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Issue of Securities
announcements.detail: Issue of Securities pursuant to Rights Issue.
announcements.ai_summary: Nexome Capital Markets Ltd has approved the allotment of 29,38,500 fully paid-up equity shares at an issue price of Rs. 75 per share, including a share premium of Rs. 65 per share. This allotment is a result of their Rights Issue, which opened on March 13, 2026, and closed on March 23, 2026, achieving an oversubscription of 100.79% against a total Rights Issue Size of Rs. 22,03,87,500. The Rights Issue Committee met on March 24, 2026, to finalize the Basis of Allotment in consultation with the Registrar to the Issue and BSE Limited. This action will modify the company's paid-up equity share capital.

announcements.subject: Simran Farms Ltd - 519566 - Board Meeting Intimation for Meeting To Be Held On Monday, 30Th March, 2026
announcements.detail: Simran Farms Ltdhas informed BSE that the meeting of the Board of Directors of the Company is scheduled on 30/03/2026 ,inter alia, to consider and approve the allotment of 10,18,300 equity shares of face value Rs. 10/- (Rupees Ten only) each, pursuant to the conversion of 10,18,300 share warrants, upon receipt of the balance 75% of the consideration amount, to the members of the promoter group and other non-promoter/other persons, in accordance with ....
announcements.ai_summary: Simran Farms Ltd will hold a Board Meeting on March 30, 2026, to consider the allotment of 10,18,300 equity shares. These shares will be issued upon conversion of 10,18,300 share warrants, following the receipt of the remaining 75% of the consideration amount. The allotment will be made to members of the promoter group and other non-promoter individuals. Each share has a face value of Rs. 10. The company is proceeding with this conversion as per the terms of the warrant agreement.

announcements.subject: Josts Engineering Company Ltd - 505750 - Intimation Regarding Authorisation Given Under Reg 30(5) Of SEBI (LODR)
announcements.detail: Intimation regarding authorisation fiven under Reg 30(5) of SEBI (LODR)Regulations 2015
announcements.ai_summary: Josts Engineering Company Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on March 24, 2026, approved the divestment of a 50% equity stake in its joint venture, Suryavayu Renewable and Energy Solutions Private Limited (SRESPL), to Kay Cee Energy & Infra Limited (Kay Cee). The sale will be conducted at a fair market value of INR 4.124 per share, as determined by a Valuation Report. Post-transaction, SRESPL will cease to be a joint venture of Josts Engineering Company Ltd. The company also approved the incorporation of a new wholly-owned subsidiary in India to leverage future growth opportunities. These decisions are in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

announcements.subject: Mysore Paper Mills Ltd - 502405 - Update on board meeting
announcements.detail:
The Board Meeting to be held on 25/03/2026 has been revised to 25/03/2026 The Board Meeting to be held on 25/03/2026 has been revised to 25/03/2026
Date is remaining same time is pre-poned from 12.00pm to 11.00am
announcements.ai_summary: Mysore Paper Mills Ltd. has pre-poned its Board Meeting originally scheduled for March 25, 2026. The meeting time has been moved from 12:30 PM to 11:00 AM on the same day, March 25, 2026, due to the Chairman's availability related to the Government of Karnataka's Adhiveshana. The agenda items for the meeting remain unchanged.

announcements.subject: INTERISE TRUST - 541300 - Reg 23(5)(i): Disclosure of material issue
announcements.detail: INTERISE TRUST has informed the Exchange regarding Disclosure of material issue
announcements.ai_summary: Interise Trust has announced the reappointment of Ms. Neera Saggi as an Independent Director for a second term of 5 years, commencing March 24, 2026, and concluding on March 23, 2031. This decision was approved by the Board of Directors of Interise Investment Managers Private Limited, the Investment Manager to Interise Trust, following the conclusion of her first 5-year term on March 23, 2026. The reappointment is subject to shareholder approval.

announcements.subject: Sanathan Textiles Ltd - 544314 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Sanathan Polycot Private Limited is a Wholly Owned Subsidiary of the Company who has entered into a Share Subscription and Shareholders Agreement and a Power Supply and Consumption Agreement to acquire 26% stake in Serentica Renewables India 33 Private Limited, for sourcing renewable power for a contracted capacity of 32 MW.
announcements.ai_summary: Sanathan Textiles Ltd.'s wholly-owned subsidiary, Sanathan Polycot Private Limited (SPPL), has entered into agreements to acquire a 26% stake in Serentica Renewables India 33 Private Limited. This acquisition, for sourcing renewable power with a contracted capacity of 32 MW, is structured through a Share Subscription and Shareholders’ Agreement and a Power Supply and Consumption Agreement. The deal is subject to conditions precedent and regulatory approvals, with completion expected in line with agreed tranche timelines.

announcements.subject: IIRM Holdings India Ltd - 526530 - Board Meeting Intimation for Prior Intimation Of Board Meeting To Be Held On March 28, 2026.
announcements.detail: IIRM Holdings India Ltdhas informed BSE that the meeting of the Board of Directors of the Company is scheduled on 28/03/2026 ,inter alia, to consider and approve Prior intimation of Board Meeting
announcements.ai_summary: IIRM Holdings India Ltd. will hold a Board Meeting on March 28, 2026, to consider and approve the provision of a Corporate Guarantee for its wholly-owned subsidiary, India Insure Risk Management and Insurance Broking Services Private Limited. The Board will also discuss potential fundraising from eligible investors. The trading window for designated persons and insiders will remain closed until 48 hours after the outcome of the Board Meeting is announced.

announcements.subject: Kotak Mahindra Bank Ltd - 500247 - Update On Kotak Mahindra Investments Limited
announcements.detail: Intimation attached
announcements.ai_summary: Kotak Mahindra Bank Ltd. has announced that its wholly-owned subsidiary, Kotak Mahindra Investments Limited (KMIL), will cease to sanction new loans from April 1, 2026. This decision, approved by KMIL's Board of Directors on March 24, 2026, aims to simplify the group structure and enhance operational synergies, in compliance with RBI Directions. KMIL will continue to service its existing facilities. The business activities of KMIL will be conducted departmentally within Kotak Mahindra Bank Ltd. going forward.

announcements.subject: Welspun Corp Ltd - 532144 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition
announcements.detail: Intragroup Transaction: Transfer of 69,30,000 (22.0%) equity shares of East Pipes Integrated Company for Industry ("EPIC") from Welspun Mauritius Holdings Limited ("WMHL") to Welspun Pipes Inc ("WPI") both wholly owned subsidiaries of the Company.
announcements.ai_summary: Welspun Corp Ltd has completed an intragroup transaction where its wholly-owned subsidiary, Welspun Pipes Inc. (WPI), acquired 69,30,000 equity shares, representing a 22.0% stake, in East Pipes Integrated Company for Industry ("EPIC") from another wholly-owned subsidiary, Welspun Mauritius Holdings Limited (WMHL). The aggregate consideration for this transaction was SAR ~979.90 million. This acquisition was approved by the respective boards of WPI and WMHL and executed on the Tadawul Stock Exchange. Following this, EPIC will become an associate company of WPI, whereas it was previously an associate of WMHL. This transaction is reported under Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations and was announced on March 24, 2026.

announcements.subject: CESC Ltd - 500084 - Incorporation Of Two Subsidiary Companies
announcements.detail: Incorporation of two subsidiary companies
announcements.ai_summary: CESC Ltd has announced the incorporation of two new wholly-owned subsidiary companies, PURVAH ECOENERGY SOLUTIONS PRIVATE LIMITED and PURVAH POWER VENTURES PRIVATE LIMITED, both incorporated on March 24, 2026. These subsidiaries were established by Purvah Green Power Private Limited, which is itself a subsidiary of CESC Ltd. This move is in line with CESC Ltd's strategy to expand its business operations. The incorporation details are in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Investors should watch for future announcements regarding the specific business activities and financial contributions of these new entities.

announcements.subject: WeWork India Management Ltd - 544570 - Disclosures of reasons for encumbrance by promoter of listed companies under Reg. 31(1) read with Regulation 28(3) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011.
announcements.detail: The Exchange has received the Disclosures of reasons for encumbrance by promoter of listed companies under Reg. 31(1) read with Regulation 28(3) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011 on March 24, 2026 for Embassy Buildcon LLP
announcements.ai_summary: Embassy Buildcon LLP, as a promoter of WeWork India Management Limited, has disclosed the reasons for encumbering its shares on March 12, 2026, in compliance with SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011. This disclosure is made under Regulation 31(1) read with Regulation 28(3). The encumbrance affects more than 20% of the total share capital of WeWork India Management Limited, although it is less than 50% of the promoter's shareholding. The specific reasons for this encumbrance have been submitted to the stock exchanges. Investors should review the disclosed reasons to understand the implications for the promoter's stake and potential future actions. The filing was received by the exchange on March 24, 2026.

announcements.subject: Supreme Infrastructure India Ltd - 532904 - Board Meeting Intimation for For Meeting To Be Held On 31St March 2026
announcements.detail: Supreme Infrastructure India Ltdhas informed BSE that the meeting of the Board of Directors of the Company is scheduled on 31/03/2026 ,inter alia, to consider and approve Conversion of warrants into equity shares and allotment of warrants
announcements.ai_summary: Supreme Infrastructure India Ltd will hold a Board Meeting on March 31, 2026, to consider and approve the conversion of warrants into equity shares and the allotment of new warrants. This meeting is crucial for the company's capital structure, as it will lead to the issuance of new equity shares and potentially raise funds. Investors should monitor the terms of the warrant conversion, including the conversion price and the number of shares to be issued. The outcome of this board meeting will impact the company's outstanding share count and its financial leverage. Further details regarding the specific number of warrants and the conversion ratio are expected to be disclosed following the board's approval.

announcements.subject: NINtec Systems Ltd - 539843 - General Update
announcements.detail: Disclosure under Regulation 7(2) of SEBI (PIT) Regulations
announcements.ai_summary: NINtec Systems Ltd has filed disclosures under Regulation 7(2) of the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. These disclosures, received from a Promoter & Director of the company in Form C, detail the purchase of equity shares. This filing is a routine compliance update regarding changes in the holdings of insiders.

announcements.subject: Aptus Pharma Ltd - 544529 - Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Board Meeting Held On March 24, 2026
announcements.detail: Outcome of Board Meeting held on March 24, 2026
announcements.ai_summary: The Board of Directors of Aptus Pharma Ltd, in their meeting held on March 24, 2026, approved a proposal to increase the company's authorized share capital from INR 7,15,00,000 to INR 25,00,00,000. This increase will be divided into 2,50,00,000 equity shares of Rs. 10 each. The board also recommended the issue of bonus equity shares, subject to member approval.

announcements.subject: Omega Interactive Technologies Ltd - 511644 - Clarification On Information Circulating On Social Media
announcements.detail: Clarification on false and misleading information circulating on social media platform such as telegram
announcements.ai_summary: Omega Interactive Technologies Ltd has issued a clarification to address false and misleading information circulating on social media platforms, specifically Telegram. The company denies involvement in or association with claims such as launching "project OMEORA," opening 500 AI centers in Gujarat, Oracle holding a 75% stake, or a 5000% profit rise. Omega Interactive Technologies Ltd is filing a formal complaint against these claims and remains committed to accurate disclosures via the BSE portal.

announcements.subject: Timex Group India Ltd-$ - 500414 - Report On Re-Lodgment Of Transfer Request Of Physical Shares
announcements.detail: Please find attached the report on re-lodgment of transfer request of physical shares in the format prescribed vide SEBI Circular No..SEBI/HO/MIRSD/MIRSD-PoD/P/CIR/2025/97 dated July 2,,2025.
announcements.ai_summary: Timex Group India Ltd has submitted a report on the re-lodgement of transfer requests for physical shares, as per SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/MIRSD/MIRSD-PoD/P/CIR/2025/97 dated July 2, 2025. In February 2026, one transfer request was processed and approved, with an average processing time of 41 days. This disclosure pertains to the company's compliance with SEBI regulations regarding the handling of physical share transfers.

announcements.subject: BCPL Railway Infrastructure Ltd - 542057 - Listing Of Its Shares With The National Stock Exchange Of India (NSE)
announcements.detail: We would like to inform you that the Company is permitted to list its securities for trading on the NSE Platform with effect from 27th March 2026.
announcements.ai_summary: BCPL Railway Infrastructure Ltd has received permission to list its equity shares on the National Stock Exchange of India (NSE) with effect from March 27, 2026. The company's shares will trade under the symbol "BCPL" in the "EQ" series. A total of 16,723,638 equity shares of face value Rs. 10 each are permitted for trading. This listing on the NSE will enhance the liquidity and accessibility of BCPL Railway Infrastructure Ltd's shares for investors.

announcements.subject: Airfloa Rail Technology Ltd - 544516 - Media Interaction With NDTV Profit On 24.03.2026
announcements.detail: Media Interaction with NDTV Profit on 24.03.2026
announcements.ai_summary: Airfloa Rail Technology Ltd announced that its Joint Managing Director, Mr. Dakshna Moorthy Manikandan, participated in a media interaction with NDTV Profit on March 24, 2026. During the interaction, recent developments and the current status of the company were discussed, based solely on publicly available information. No unpublished price-sensitive information (UPSI) was disclosed. A recording of the interaction is available online.

announcements.subject: Torrent Pharmaceuticals Ltd - 500420 - Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of SEBI LODR - NCLT Order
announcements.detail: Announcement under Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR - NCLT Order
announcements.ai_summary: Torrent Pharmaceuticals Limited announced on March 24, 2026, that the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Ahmedabad Bench, has uploaded an order regarding the first motion application for the proposed amalgamation of J.B. Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Limited with Torrent Pharmaceuticals Limited. This order was uploaded on the NCLT website on March 23, 2026. This announcement is a continuation of the company's earlier intimation dated June 29, 2025, regarding the amalgamation scheme. The NCLT order is a significant regulatory step in the amalgamation process.

announcements.subject: Suditi Industries Ltd - 521113 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment
announcements.detail: Revised outcome filed for allotment of 6,95,100 Equity shares and 15,55,600 Warrants convertible into Equity shares on a preferential basis

The board approved the allotment of 6,95,100 Equity Shares at Rs. 59.12 per share, aggregating to Rs. 4,10,94,312. Additionally, 15,55,600 Warrants convertible into Equity Shares were also approved for allotment on a preferential basis. This allotment follows member approval obtained at an Extra-Ordinary General Meeting on January 16, 2026, and in-principal approval from BSE Limited on March 16, 2026. The company is proceeding with these allotments as per SEBI Listing Regulations.

announcements.subject: Ugro Capital Ltd - 511742 - Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment

This allotment was made as per the particulars provided in the annexure to the announcement. The company has made this information available on its website, www.ugrocapital.com, for public access. This action is in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The Commercial Papers are unlisted securities.

announcements.subject: Garware Hi-Tech Films Ltd - 500655 - Board Meeting Intimation for Considering And Approving The Annual Business / Operational Plan.
